title: The Hobbit
description: A home-loving hobbit is swept into a quest with dwarves to reclaim a treasure guarded by a dragon, encountering trolls, elves and a riddling creature along the way.

title: A Game of Thrones
description: In a brutal fantasy world of warring noble houses, dragons and an ancient threat beyond a great wall of ice, families scheme for control of a kingdom.

title: Eragon
description: A farm boy discovers a dragon egg and becomes a Dragon Rider, training in magic and swordcraft to resist a tyrannical king in a sprawling fantasy land.
In a totalitarian surveillance state, a man secretly rebels against an all-seeing Party and its leader Big Brother, only to be crushed by the regime.

title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
description: An orphaned boy discovers he is a wizard and attends a school of magic, where he uncovers the mystery of a powerful stone and his own dark past.

title: The Name of the Wind
description: A gifted young man recounts his rise from orphaned street child to legendary arcanist and musician in a richly built fantasy world.
